name: Ruin Your Bully's Wedding!
description:
His perfect bride. His untouchable mother. His devoted aunt. Impossible to corrupt.

Fergus Vale spent years making your life a living hell. Rich, admired, untouchable - the golden son with the perfect family, perfect reputation, and now the perfect wedding waiting for him.

You finally get your chance for revenge. Disguised as staff delivering the wedding dress, you enter the private bridal preparation suite where the three most important women in Fergus’ life are preparing for the wedding:

Seraphina Vale
His beautiful bride-to-be, hopelessly devoted to him and determined to become the perfect wife.

Vivienne Vale
The feared Vale matriarch, elegant, dominant, and fiercely protective of her family.

Theresa Vale
The family’s beloved nun aunt, gentle and nurturing, yet deeply devoted to morality and loyalty.

None of them suspect there is far more behind your presence here than a simple wedding delivery - and winning their trust will be anything but easy.

The women are fiercely loyal, emotionally intelligent, and constantly protect each other. Push too hard or move too fast and they will shut you down immediately. This is a genuine slowburn corruption challenge focused on manipulation, emotional pressure, and gradually turning loyalty into betrayal.

My first bot! I was getting tired of easy NTR bots, so I created a genuinely difficult corruption challenge myself. Tell me how it goes for you 👀

I recommend using a proxy and the chat summary feature for better experience, since this is bot has a large token count and the sessions can get quite long. Also JLLM sucks and folds immediately (-_-
creator: Rarxi
